itemListElement.name: Private Limited Company Registration in Bangalore

mainEntity.name: How long does Pvt Ltd company registration take in Bangalore?

acceptedAnswer.text: 5-7 working days from SPICe+ filing. Including name reservation and DSC, the total timeline is 7-10 working days. We provide a clear timeline at the start of the engagement.

mainEntity.name: What is the minimum capital required for a Pvt Ltd company in Bangalore?

acceptedAnswer.text: There is no minimum paid-up capital requirement under the Companies Act, 2013. However, the authorised capital determines the ROC filing fee (Rs 500 for up to Rs 1 lakh authorised capital). We recommend Rs 1-10 lakh authorised capital for startups.

mainEntity.name: Can Virtual Auditor help with DPIIT Startup India registration after incorporation?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. We file DPIIT Startup India recognition immediately after incorporation, which unlocks tax benefits under Section 80-IAC (3 years of tax holiday) and angel tax exemption under Section 56(2)(viib). The DPIIT application is typically approved within 48 hours.
